text:
On Tue, Apr 24, 2007 at 09:40:09PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/lynx,
>

> The full text of the PR can be found at:

These patches don't apply cleanly.  Please send a corrected one that
has exactly the desired changes.  Thanks.
